title: Sewing pattern 8082
garment_elements: recommendable with a transparent lace bottom for a petticoat effect
short_description: Satin lingerie dress with lace appliqué, optionally featuring a transparent lace bottom for a petticoat effect.
pattern_info: Paper patterns are already cut out in single sizes and ready to be put on the fabric. Sizes available: 42, 46, 48. Patterns do not include seams and hems or step-by-step instructions. Marked with all information, notches and letters to assemble pieces. Fabric required: about mt. 1.30 – mt. 1.40 wide.
raw_text:
Satin lingerie dress with lace appliqué on the fabric. Also recommendable with a transparent lace bottom for a petticoat effect.
Collections: Autumn/Winter, Spring/Summer
Size: 42, 46, 48
Typology: Dress, Evening Gowns
Style: Elegant, Trendy
Fabric required: about mt. 1.30 – mt. 1.40 wide.
Since our paper patterns are already cut out in single sizes and ready to be put on the fabric, we recommend that you determine your size based on our size chart. To do this just go to the "Size Guide" section on each pattern's page.
The Marfy patterns:
1. They are hand clipped each piece, in single size.
2. They don’t include seams and hems as well as step-by-step instructions.
3. They are marked with all information, notches and letters to put the pieces together.
